iter2: card header overlap + vertical fill (visual finding) + font tracing in next.config.ts

visual_inspection.card_coal: body excellent (bullseye/goal/bar/streak/stats/fonts OK); BUGS: header counter+daterange overlap; footer crammed under stats with ~500px dead space at bottom
visual_inspection.story_slide_1: renders correctly — header clean, full layout good; do not touch slides
visual_inspection.qa_findings: header box-model (moderate, fixing), font Vercel-tracing (low, fixing), PRD AC-9 download-count wording (doc, fixed), all-caps header + overflow:hidden (cosmetic, leaving)

smoke_results.story_1: FAIL satori multi-child div — fix in progress
smoke_results.mcp_tools_call: image(valid PNG, no data: prefix)+text blocks; goalState has-data, 2 workouts — DB reachable at runtime
smoke_results.build: compiles+bundles OK; static prerender of DB pages fails (no Neon in sandbox) — environmental, not a recap defect

known_followups: Geist-SemiBold.ttf is a temp copy of Regular (true SemiBold 404'd) — swap real file later; bold renders as regular until then
dev_sequencing: A (engine/render/MCP) → merge → B (routes/page); B imports A so sequential per dependency

decisions_addendum.header_denominator: dynamic plan.totalWeeks*7 (currently 84), NOT fixed 90 — user sign-off
decisions_addendum.ux_direction: Bullseye Hero; templates Coal (default) + Parchment; pure-flexbox div-stack; fonts Geist + DM Serif Display

decisions.header: Week N · Day M of 90 (program week + day-of-90, anchored to plan startedOn)
decisions.progress_bar: goal-generic via computeReadiness(focusGoal.targets, weekEnd, focusGoal.id); dynamic goal label; never hardcode Elbert
decisions.week_scope: current week through today (weekOffset 0 default), selectable backward
decisions.mcp_output: generate_recap_card returns inline PNG + structured stats; defaults focus goal + current week; accepts goalId/weekOffset
decisions.render: next/og ImageResponse, 1080x1920 PNG + 3-slide Stories set; no Prisma migration
